content.question: What would be the net fiscal and distributional impact (both direct cost and opportunity cost in terms of foregone compensatory measures) of eliminating versus preserving the 6- and 8-year gimnázium tracks under current or reformed funding rules?
content.reduction_path: Commission a formal cost-benefit and fiscal-incidence analysis modeling: (a) direct operating cost differences between selective and non-selective schools; (b) private tutoring and household-level costs of gaining track access; (c) lifetime earnings and tax-contribution effects by track attendance and socioeconomic origin; (d) resource reallocation scenarios if the gymnazium budget were redirected to disadvantaged schools or early intervention programs.
